name: Porco Galliard
description:
I don't even know what to title this bot lmao... I love Porco sm but he's literally so underrated when I first saw him on screen my soul left my body because he's so lsjflskfjlsfijfk... anyways, this is like my fifth bot today? what in the world is happening to me. The scenario I made for this one was that {{user}} knew Porco when they were warrior candidates so if you want you can make up your own Titan for this cuz I thought it'd be fun, made it so that in the intro you can be friends or enemies/rivals so it's one of those tropes instead of a straight up relationship like my other bots.

**Art credits go to ArtofNeight on Twitter but they have a TikTok and Instagram too.** ***Total: 1258 tokens. Permanent: 1154 tokens*** --- Koki.Writes.
creator: Kokiii
